citations.narrative:
On October 14, 2025 at 7:30 am, Galos, an approximately 4-year-old Laughing Kookaburra, escaped its outdoor primary
enclosure. The licensee stated the bird escaped by flying out of the enclosure door while they were entering the
enclosure. The bird was immediately observed by the licensee on the roof of an adjacent building. Despite capture
attempts, the bird was not recovered. On October 15, 2025, at approximately 12:00pm, the licensee found the partial
remains of the bird on the premises due to suspected predation. Failure to secure enclosures can result in animal escape
which can lead to injury, death, and/or lack of access to food and water.
Housing facilities for birds must employ security measures that contain all the birds securely. Such measures may include
safety doors, entry/exit doors to the primary enclosure that are double door, or other systems designed to prevent escape
of the birds.
Correct by April 15, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
n

narrative:
3.150(a)  Critical
   
Facilities, general. 
On October 14, 2025 at 7:30 am, Galos, an approximately 4-year-old Laughing Kookaburra, escaped its outdoor primary 
enclosure. The licensee stated the bird escaped by flying out of the enclosure door while they were entering the 
enclosure. The bird was immediately observed by the licensee on the roof of an adjacent building. Despite capture 
attempts, the bird was not recovered. On October 15, 2025, at approximately 12:00pm, the licensee found the partial 
remains of the bird on the premises due to suspected predation. Failure to secure enclosures can result in animal escape 
which can lead to injury, death, and/or lack of access to food and water. 
 
Housing facilities for birds must employ security measures that contain all the birds securely. Such measures may include 
safety doors, entry/exit doors to the primary enclosure that are double door, or other systems designed to prevent escape 
of the birds.  
 
 
Correct by April 15, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
